title: Authentication flow fails due to broken redirect URI in VS Code
description: After initiating authentication via the MCP setup in VS Code, the user is redirected to a localhost URL that fails to connect. The authentication flow does not complete successfully, and users are repeatedly prompted to reauthenticate on restart.

title: Route rewrite output incompatible with redirect configuration causing build failure
description: Using routes.rewrite() with deploymentEnv() returns route objects in an unexpected format that is incompatible with rewrites and redirects configuration arrays. This leads to build failures during deployment.

title: Local model integration fails with template errors despite valid setup
description: Running a local Qwen 3.5 model in a docker agent results in repeated template errors, even though the model works correctly in other clients. The issue blocks usage of local model integrations.

title: Copy command returns full conversation instead of compacted version
description: After using the compact command to summarize a conversation, running the copy command returns the full original conversation instead of the compacted version. This results in incorrect output behavior.

title: Session store not properly closed leading to potential resource leak
description: The session store created during runtime is not explicitly closed, causing unclosed database connections and potential resource leaks. The issue may accumulate over time and degrade system performance.

title: Shell commands are unexpectedly queued instead of executing immediately
description: Certain shell commands are being queued instead of executing immediately, leading to unexpected delays in execution and confusing behavior for users interacting with the CLI.

title: Model resumes previous thinking process after interruption
description: When a long-running thinking process is interrupted and a new message is sent, the model often resumes its previous internal reasoning instead of responding to the new input. This leads to incorrect or confusing outputs.

title: Commands requiring password input hang and do not recover gracefully
description: Commands that require interactive input, such as password prompts, often hang and fail to complete. The system does not provide a clear fallback or recovery mechanism, forcing manual intervention.

title: Assistant message with tool calls violates AWS Bedrock API protocol
description: Assistant responses that include both tool calls and content violate AWS Bedrock API protocol, resulting in validation exceptions and failed requests during execution.

title: Session resume fails due to tool call mismatch in Bedrock integration
description: Resuming a session using Bedrock results in a validation exception due to mismatched tool call and tool result blocks. The issue prevents successful session restoration across all cases.

title: Subagent tool calls not executed despite valid responses
description: When using LiteLLM proxy, subagents return valid tool call responses but the host agent fails to execute them, reporting no response from the subagent. This breaks tool execution workflows.

title: Deployed pages return 404 errors despite working in local development
description: After deployment, certain pages consistently return 404 errors even though they function correctly in local development environments. Navigation and direct access to routes are affected.

title: Rust runtime fails with address already in use error
description: Running the Rust runtime in development results in an address already in use error, preventing the application from starting successfully.

title: Environment variable command truncates multiline values
description: Adding environment variables via CLI truncates multiline values such as PEM keys, only preserving the first line and silently discarding the rest without warning.

title: Autocomplete component placeholder persists after selection
description: In multiple selection mode, the autocomplete component continues to display placeholder text even after values are selected, resulting in inconsistent UI behavior.

title: Inconsistent logo usage across website pages
description: Different versions of the logo are displayed across various pages of the website, leading to inconsistent branding and visual discrepancies.

title: Swipeable drawer crashes due to undefined property access
description: Opening and closing a swipeable drawer in certain conditions causes a runtime error due to undefined property access, leading to application crashes.

title: Vercel CLI truncates multiline environment variables when added via stdin
description: Adding environment variables through the Vercel CLI using stdin truncates multiline values such as PEM private keys. Only the first line is stored while subsequent lines are silently dropped, leading to invalid credentials without warning.

title: Swipeable drawer crashes due to external ref overriding internal ref
description: Using an external ref with a swipeable drawer component causes mergeSlotProps to overwrite the internal ref, resulting in a runtime error and application crash when attempting to close the drawer.

title: Website displays inconsistent MUI logos across pages
description: Different variants of the MUI logo are used across the website, leading to inconsistent branding and visual discrepancies between pages.

title: Autocomplete placeholder remains visible after selecting multiple values
description: In multiple selection mode, the autocomplete component continues to display placeholder text alongside selected values instead of hiding it, causing confusing UI behavior.

title: Firebase React cannot be used with Chrome extension Manifest V3
description: Firebase React applications cannot run within Chrome extensions using Manifest V3 due to CSP restrictions, preventing authentication and other core features from functioning.

title: Firebase messaging example fails due to service worker registration error
description: The Firebase Cloud Messaging example fails to register the default service worker, resulting in an error and preventing messaging functionality from working in the browser.

title: Firebase app displays duplicate notifications when running in background
description: When the application is in the background, Firebase messaging triggers duplicate notifications instead of a single expected message, leading to inconsistent behavior.

title: OAuth flow fails with 404 error for GitHub MCP server
description: Attempting to authenticate using the GitHub MCP server results in a 404 error during the OAuth flow, preventing successful authorization and blocking access.

title: Autocomplete dropdown closes immediately when VoiceOver is enabled
description: When VoiceOver is enabled, the autocomplete dropdown closes as soon as an option is hovered or focused, making it impossible to select any option using assistive technology.

title: Billing thresholds removed from API without replacement guidance
description: Stripe removed billing thresholds from the subscriptions API without providing a clear migration path. Existing functionality for usage-based billing is broken, and API requests using billing thresholds now fail.

title: TypeScript types incorrect when expanding Stripe API responses
description: Expanding nested Stripe API response fields does not update TypeScript types accordingly, forcing developers to manually assert types and making the SDK difficult to use.

title: Developers cannot inspect Stripe API request details
description: There is no clear way to inspect request details such as URL, method, headers, or payload when using Stripe APIs, limiting debugging visibility and developer experience.

title: Stripe Checkout prototype object appears empty or incomplete
description: The Stripe Checkout prototype object does not expose expected methods and appears empty compared to other resource prototypes, suggesting incomplete or broken SDK implementation.

title: Next.js font optimization breaks letter spacing in MUI typography
description: Using next/font integration with MUI causes incorrect letter-spacing in Typography components, leading to inconsistent text rendering.

title: Documentation incorrectly describes Grid direction prop behavior
description: The Grid component documentation lists the direction prop as valid, but migration guides state otherwise, causing confusion about correct usage.

title: Popover causes page jump when opened on zoomed mobile Chrome
description: Opening a popover while the page is zoomed on mobile Chrome causes the page to jump position and disables normal scrolling, making the UI difficult to use.

title: CSS ordering differs between SSR and client in MUI with styled-components
description: MUI components styled with styled-components have inconsistent CSS ordering between server-side rendering and client hydration, causing visual inconsistencies in production.

title: Hydration error occurs with MUI icons in Next.js Turbopack mode
description: Using MUI icons with Next.js Turbopack leads to hydration mismatches between server-rendered and client-rendered HTML, causing runtime errors and broken UI.

title: Fade transition fails when exit timeout is undefined
description: Passing undefined as the exit timeout in transition components prevents the component from exiting properly, leaving UI elements stuck and blocking user interaction.

title: Google sign-in flow breaks by opening in custom tab loop
description: The Google sign-in button opens in a custom tab and repeatedly reloads, trapping users in a loop and preventing successful login completion.

title: All users unable to authenticate due to token validation failure
description: Following a recent deployment, all authentication requests fail due to invalid token validation errors. Users across all regions are unable to log in, effectively blocking access to the platform.

title: Payment processing failing globally for all transactions
description: All payment attempts are failing during checkout with server errors. The issue affects all customers and prevents any transactions from completing.

title: API returns 500 errors for all endpoints after deployment
description: After a recent release, all API endpoints are returning 500 internal server errors. No requests are successfully processed, impacting all application functionality.

title: Database outage prevents all read and write operations
description: The primary database is unreachable, causing all read and write operations to fail. This results in a complete service outage for all users.

title: Deployment pipeline pushes broken build to production affecting all users
description: A faulty build was deployed to production, causing the application to crash on load for all users. The system is unusable until rollback.

title: Session service outage logs out all users and prevents new sessions
description: The session management service is down, forcing all active users to be logged out and preventing new sessions from being created.

title: Cloud storage failure prevents file uploads and downloads globally
description: The storage service is unavailable, preventing users from uploading or accessing any files. All file-related features are non-functional.

title: Configuration error exposes sensitive user data publicly
description: A misconfigured API endpoint is exposing sensitive user data without authentication. The issue affects all users and poses a critical security risk.

title: Caching layer failure causes stale data returned across all users
description: A failure in the caching system is causing outdated and incorrect data to be served to all users, affecting core application functionality.

title: Load balancer misconfiguration routes all traffic to invalid endpoint
description: Incoming traffic is incorrectly routed due to a load balancer misconfiguration, causing all user requests to fail.

title: Third-party authentication provider outage blocks all OAuth logins
description: An outage in the external OAuth provider prevents all users from logging in via third-party authentication, affecting a majority of users.

title: Message queue failure halts background job processing system-wide
description: The message queue system has stopped processing jobs, causing all asynchronous tasks such as notifications and data processing to fail.

title: DNS misconfiguration makes application unreachable globally
description: A DNS configuration issue prevents users from accessing the application entirely. All domains fail to resolve.

title: Critical bug deletes user data during account update process
description: Updating account settings triggers unintended deletion of user data across multiple accounts, resulting in data loss.

title: Rate limiting misconfiguration blocks all incoming requests
description: A misconfigured rate limiter is rejecting all incoming requests, effectively taking the entire application offline.

title: create_invoice tool always returns failure despite valid parameters
description: The create_invoice MCP tool consistently returns a 'Failed to create invoice' error even when valid parameters such as customer ID are provided. The same request succeeds when executed via direct HTTP API, indicating an issue specific to the MCP tool implementation.

title: Missing fdb_c_types.h in FoundationDB 7.3.69 headers
description: The FoundationDB 7.3.69 release is missing the fdb_c_types.h header file in the fdb-headers package, causing build and integration issues for users depending on these headers.

title: Build failure with undefined symbol std::ios_base_library_init in Docker image
description: Building FoundationDB using the official rockylinux9 Docker image fails during linking due to an undefined reference to std::ios_base_library_init(). This prevents successful compilation of the project.

title: DataDistributor internal error causes infinite recovery loop
description: The Data Distributor encounters an internal error and becomes stuck in a crash-recovery loop, preventing normal operation. The issue blocks cluster functionality and risks data inconsistency.

title: Subspace pack and packWithVersionstamp throw inconsistent errors
description: Subspace#pack throws errors for incomplete versionstamps while packWithVersionstamp throws errors for complete versionstamps, creating confusing and inconsistent behavior for developers using versionstamps.

title: MCP list_customers returns only IDs instead of full customer objects
description: The MCP list_customers tool returns only customer IDs instead of full customer objects with details such as name, email, and address. This makes the tool unusable for many agent workflows.

title: StreamCipher implementation lacks proper AES-GCM authentication
description: The StreamCipher encryption implementation does not correctly generate or verify authentication tags, making it vulnerable to tampering attacks. This compromises data integrity and security guarantees.

title: FoundationDB should support binding to 0.0.0.0
description: FoundationDB does not appear to support binding the service to 0.0.0.0, limiting deployment flexibility for users who need the database to listen on all interfaces.

title: Native Prometheus and OpenTelemetry export support requested
description: FoundationDB lacks native export support for Prometheus and OpenTelemetry metrics, making observability and monitoring more difficult in production environments.

title: RPM conflict occurs during multi-version client installation
description: Following the documented multi-version client installation path from FoundationDB 6.3.23 to 7.1.65 results in an RPM conflict error, preventing a successful upgrade.

title: Transaction API getCommittedVersion causes unnecessary autoboxing
description: The FoundationDB Transaction API getCommittedVersion implementation introduces avoidable autoboxing overhead, which can hurt efficiency in performance-sensitive code paths.

title: FoundationDB client package does not install pkgconfig file
description: The FoundationDB client package fails to install a pkgconfig file, creating integration and build configuration problems for downstream consumers.

title: CLI deploy no longer includes Git commit metadata in production deploys
description: Running a production deploy with the Vercel CLI no longer includes Git commit metadata, reducing traceability and making it harder to map deployments back to source changes.

title: vercel link with aliased host fails for repository linking
description: Using vercel link with the --repo option does not work correctly when the repository uses an aliased host, blocking expected project linking behavior.

title: vercel env add fails in non-interactive mode without Git branch
description: The Vercel CLI cannot add environment variables in non-interactive mode when no Git branch is present, preventing automation workflows from completing successfully.

title: MongoDB connection fails on Vercel despite open IP whitelist
description: Applications deployed on Vercel fail to connect to MongoDB and Mongoose even when the database IP whitelist is configured to allow all addresses, blocking backend connectivity.

title: Vercel site has links without accessible text
description: Several links on vercel.com do not have accessible text, creating an accessibility issue that may prevent assistive technology users from understanding link purpose.

title: PaymentIntent next action type is exported too broadly as string
description: The exported Stripe.PaymentIntent.NextAction.type definition is too broad and typed as a generic string, reducing type safety and making integrations harder to validate at compile time.

title: retrieve calls should support object argument reuse with existing expansions
description: Stripe retrieve calls do not provide a convenient way to accept an object as the first argument and reuse existing expansions, creating unnecessary duplication in client code.

title: NPM module alias breaks module type resolution in Stripe Node
description: Using an NPM module alias with Stripe Node prevents module type resolution from working correctly, leading to import and build issues in affected projects.

title: Fade transition fails when timeout.exit is undefined
description: Passing undefined for timeout.exit in MUI transition behavior causes the component to remain in the wrong state and can leave UI elements stuck over other content.

title: Next.js hydration mismatch occurs with MUI and Pigment CSS
description: Using MUI with Pigment CSS in Next.js can trigger hydration mismatches between server-rendered and client-rendered output, causing runtime warnings and broken rendering.

title: Mounting many TextField inputs should warn about global style injection cost
description: Mounting a large number of MUI TextField inputs can create performance issues related to global style injection, but the current behavior provides no warning or guidance.

title: Vercel deployment fails intermittently with unexplained build errors
description: Deployments on Vercel occasionally fail with non-deterministic build errors, even when no changes have been made to the codebase. Re-running the deployment sometimes succeeds without modification.

title: Environment variables not applied correctly during Vercel build process
description: Environment variables configured in Vercel are not consistently available during the build step, leading to runtime failures and incorrect application behavior.

title: Vercel preview deployments show incorrect routing behavior
description: Preview deployments on Vercel route traffic incorrectly for certain paths, causing users to land on unintended pages or receive 404 errors.

title: Build cache inconsistency causes outdated assets to be served
description: Vercel build cache occasionally serves outdated static assets after deployment, even after cache invalidation is expected.

title: FoundationDB cluster fails to recover after coordinator failure
description: When a coordinator node fails, the FoundationDB cluster does not recover automatically and remains in a degraded state, blocking normal database operations.

title: FoundationDB backup process hangs indefinitely under load
description: Running backup operations under heavy load causes the process to hang indefinitely, preventing backups from completing and risking data protection.

title: FoundationDB client crashes due to invalid transaction state handling
description: The client library crashes when handling certain invalid transaction states, leading to application instability and unexpected termination.

title: FoundationDB configuration changes not applied without full restart
description: Updating configuration parameters does not take effect until a full cluster restart is performed, limiting operational flexibility.

title: MUI component renders incorrectly under specific screen sizes
description: Certain Material UI components render with incorrect layout and spacing on specific screen sizes, causing visual inconsistencies in responsive designs.

title: MUI form input loses focus unexpectedly during state updates
description: Form input components in Material UI lose focus when state updates occur, interrupting user input and degrading usability.

title: MUI DataGrid sorting produces inconsistent results
description: Sorting rows in the DataGrid component produces inconsistent ordering for certain datasets, making it unreliable for data presentation.

title: Stripe webhook events occasionally fail without retry
description: Stripe webhook events sometimes fail to be delivered and are not retried, resulting in missed updates for payment status and subscription changes.

title: Stripe Node SDK fails to handle invalid API responses gracefully
description: The Stripe Node SDK throws unhandled errors when receiving malformed or unexpected API responses instead of returning structured error objects.

title: Stripe Node SDK fails when handling nested expand parameters
description: Using nested expand parameters in Stripe API requests causes unexpected behavior or errors, making it difficult to retrieve fully expanded objects in a single request.

title: Stripe AI tool fails to return expected structured output
description: The Stripe AI tool occasionally returns unstructured or malformed output instead of the expected structured format, breaking downstream processing workflows.

title: Stripe AI assistant fails to correctly interpret user intent in prompts
description: The AI assistant incorrectly interprets user prompts in certain cases, leading to irrelevant or incorrect responses and reducing usability.

title: Vercel deployment fails for large monorepos with timeout errors
description: Deployments for large monorepo projects frequently fail due to timeout errors during build or upload phases, preventing successful production releases.

title: Vercel does not correctly detect project root in nested repositories
description: When deploying nested repositories, Vercel fails to correctly identify the project root, resulting in incorrect builds and deployment failures.

title: Vercel deployment fails silently without clear error logs
description: Certain deployments fail without producing clear or actionable error logs, making it difficult to debug issues in production pipelines.

title: Vercel CLI authentication fails intermittently
description: Users experience intermittent authentication failures when using the Vercel CLI, requiring repeated login attempts to proceed.

title: Vercel preview deployment environment variables not syncing correctly
description: Environment variables defined for preview deployments are not consistently applied, leading to discrepancies between preview and production environments.

title: Vercel routing configuration breaks dynamic routes unexpectedly
description: Custom routing configurations cause dynamic routes to break unexpectedly, resulting in incorrect page rendering or 404 responses.

title: Vercel build process produces inconsistent output across environments
description: Build outputs differ between local and cloud environments, leading to inconsistencies in deployed applications.

title: Vercel deployment cache causes outdated files to persist after redeploy
description: Cached files from previous deployments persist even after redeploying, causing outdated content to be served to users.

title: Vercel CLI fails to link project in certain repository configurations
description: The Vercel CLI is unable to correctly link a project in certain repository setups, blocking deployment workflows.

title: MUI component styles break when using custom theme overrides
description: Applying custom theme overrides in MUI leads to unexpected style conflicts and broken component layouts.

title: MUI Tooltip positioning incorrect in scrollable containers
description: Tooltip components render in incorrect positions when used inside scrollable containers, reducing usability.

title: MUI Button component does not respect disabled state under certain conditions
description: Buttons marked as disabled still respond to user interaction in specific scenarios, leading to unintended actions.

title: Button text misaligned on mobile view
description: Button labels appear slightly misaligned on smaller screen sizes, causing minor visual inconsistency.

title: Tooltip flickers on hover
description: Tooltip briefly flickers when hovering over elements due to rapid re-rendering.

title: Documentation example contains outdated API usage
description: The official documentation includes examples using deprecated API methods, leading to confusion for developers.

title: Input placeholder overlaps with label
description: Form input placeholder text overlaps with floating label when focused, causing readability issues.

title: Minor delay in dropdown animation
description: Dropdown menus show a slight delay before opening, affecting perceived responsiveness.

title: Color contrast insufficient for accessibility
description: Text color does not meet accessibility contrast guidelines in dark mode.

title: Console warning appears during normal usage
description: Non-critical warning messages are logged in the console during standard application usage.

title: Pagination component skips pages intermittently
description: Pagination navigation occasionally skips pages when rapidly clicking next.

title: API returns inconsistent field names across endpoints
description: Different API endpoints return inconsistent naming conventions for similar fields.

title: Session expires earlier than configured
description: User sessions expire earlier than the configured timeout, forcing unexpected logouts.

title: Search results not sorted correctly
description: Search results are not consistently sorted by relevance or date as expected.

title: Users unable to reset password via email link
description: Password reset links sent via email fail to properly redirect users, blocking password recovery.

title: File uploads fail for large files
description: Uploading files above a certain size threshold results in failure without clear error messaging.

title: All API requests failing due to misconfigured environment variable
description: A missing environment variable causes all API requests to fail, impacting all users.

title: Authentication service outage prevents all logins
description: The authentication service is down, blocking all login attempts across the platform.

title: SwipeableDrawer external ref overrides internal ref
description: Providing an external ref causes internal ref to be overwritten.

title: TextField cuts off text in high contrast mode
description: Text is clipped when using accessibility high contrast mode.

title: CSS variable color not supported in palette
description: Using var(--css-variable) in theme palette throws error.

title: Docs contain incorrect import for InfoOutline icon
description: Copy-paste import example is incorrect in documentation.

title: MUI logos inconsistent across website
description: Brand logos differ across pages.

title: Docs unclear for ScopedCssBaseline font usage
description: Font usage differs but documentation lacks explanation.

title: Input labels disappear on iOS
description: Form labels vanish when typing on iOS devices.

title: Screen reader reads background content behind dialog
description: Narrator continues reading page behind modal dialog.

title: Autocomplete width regression in latest version
description: Component width behaves incorrectly after update.

title: Deprecated props still present across components
description: Deprecated props remain in API surface.

title: Dialog focus trap not working correctly
description: Focus escapes dialog when navigating with keyboard.

title: Button ripple effect inconsistent across browsers
description: Ripple animation behaves differently between browsers.

title: Tooltip positioning incorrect near screen edges
description: Tooltip overflows viewport on small screens.

title: Snackbar not dismissing automatically
description: Auto-hide duration not respected.

title: Theme overrides not applied to nested components
description: Nested components ignore theme customizations.

title: Menu keyboard navigation skips items
description: Arrow keys skip over menu items intermittently.

title: List item spacing inconsistent across variants
description: Spacing differs between dense and default modes.

title: Checkbox state not updating visually
description: State updates but UI does not reflect change immediately.

title: Grid layout breaks with nested containers
description: Nested grids cause unexpected layout shifts.

title: Icon buttons have inconsistent padding
description: Padding differs between icon button variants.

description: Edge functions cause build failure in certain configurations.

title: Vercel logs missing error details for failed deployments
description: Deployment logs do not include sufficient debugging information.

description: Preview deployments occasionally return 404 for valid routes.

title: Vercel CLI fails when project contains symlinked directories
description: CLI crashes or exits when encountering symlinked folders.

title: Vercel environment variables not updating after redeploy
description: Changes to env vars are not reflected in subsequent deployments.

title: Stripe webhook signature verification fails for valid events
description: Valid webhook events fail signature validation unexpectedly.

description: Optional fields cause runtime errors when missing.

title: Stripe API returns inconsistent currency formatting
description: Currency values differ in format across endpoints.

title: Stripe retry logic not triggered for failed requests
description: Failed API requests are not retried automatically.

title: FoundationDB cluster reports incorrect storage metrics
description: Reported disk usage does not match actual usage.

title: FoundationDB transaction timeout not respected
description: Transactions continue running past configured timeout.

description: CLI displays inconsistent formatting for similar commands.

description: Dropdown remains open after clicking outside.

title: MUI Dialog scroll lock not released after close
description: Page remains unscrollable after dialog closes.

title: MUI Typography renders incorrect font weight
description: Font weight differs from specified theme value.

description: Value label overlaps slider thumb at certain values.

description: Changing filters resets pagination state.

description: Invalid query parameters trigger server errors.

description: Updated data not reflected due to cache delay.

title: Search placeholder text is not localized

title: Snackbar dismiss button too close to message text
description: Dismiss icon crowds the notification message on narrow screens.

title: Empty table state uses inconsistent copy capitalization

description: Status chips with similar text lengths render with uneven padding.

description: Focused state removes the input border in some browsers.

description: Menu elevation causes visual overlap with adjacent panels.

description: Header title wraps to two lines on some tablets.

title: Code block copy button shifts on hover
description: Copy button moves slightly when hovered in docs pages.

title: Select placeholder appears darker than input text
description: Placeholder text uses the wrong color token in forms.

title: Form field autocomplete background flashes on load

title: Sidebar collapse animation feels abrupt

title: API docs response sample missing optional field explanation
description: Documentation omits explanation for an optional response field.

title: Checkbox label not announced correctly by screen reader
description: Assistive technology reads an incomplete label for checkboxes.

title: Keyboard focus ring disappears after tabbing through menu
description: Focus styling is lost after navigating several menu items.

title: Table sorting resets selected row unexpectedly
description: Sorting a table clears the active row selection.

title: Autosave triggers twice for a single edit
description: Editing a field causes duplicate autosave requests.

title: Search filters remain applied after reset
description: Resetting filters does not fully clear previous filter state.

title: API returns inconsistent date format in activity feed
description: Dates in the activity feed use mixed formatting styles.

title: Notification center duplicates one event after refresh
description: Refreshing notifications can cause a duplicate item to appear.

title: Session timeout warning appears too early
description: The timeout warning modal appears well before configured expiry.

title: Webhook payload omits metadata on retry delivery
description: Retried webhook deliveries are missing metadata fields.

title: Infinite scroll loads duplicate page at boundary
description: Crossing a page boundary occasionally loads the same records twice.

title: CSV export excludes last visible column
description: Exported CSV files omit the final column in some tables.

title: Account switcher shows stale workspace name
description: Workspace label does not refresh after switching accounts.

title: Rate limit header missing from successful responses
description: Successful responses do not include expected rate limit metadata.

title: Billing history list fails to sort by date descending
description: Newest billing events do not reliably appear first.

title: Image upload progress stalls at 99 percent
description: Upload completes but progress UI remains stuck near completion.

title: Theme toggle requires second click after refresh
description: The first click after page reload does not change the theme.

title: Saved draft loses tag selections after reopen
description: Reopening a saved draft clears previously selected tags.

title: OAuth callback rejects valid state parameter occasionally
description: A subset of valid login callbacks are rejected due to state mismatch.

title: Customer invoice preview shows incorrect discount total
description: Invoice previews calculate discounts incorrectly before finalization.

title: Webhook retry queue stops processing after one failed event
description: A single failed event can block later webhook retries from processing.

title: Preview deployment serves previous branch content
description: Preview URLs sometimes display content from an older branch.

title: Search index job fails silently for newly created projects
description: New projects do not appear in search because indexing fails without alerting.

title: Password reset links expire immediately for some users
description: Some reset links are marked expired immediately after delivery.

title: Background sync drops updates when network reconnects
description: Pending changes are lost after reconnect during background sync.

title: Role permission update not applied until user logs out
description: Permission changes do not take effect immediately for active users.

title: Invoice finalization fails for subscriptions with metered usage
description: Metered subscriptions cannot finalize invoices in some billing cycles.

title: File processing queue retries same corrupted file indefinitely
description: Corrupted files loop in retry processing and block queue throughput.

title: User invitations fail for domains with uppercase characters
description: Inviting users with uppercase domain letters results in rejected requests.

title: Analytics export job times out for medium-sized accounts
description: Exports for moderately large accounts fail before completion.

title: Primary API region fails health checks after config rollout
description: A configuration rollout causes the primary region to fail health checks.

title: All checkout sessions return server error for live payments
description: Live checkout sessions fail across all customers with server errors.

title: Authentication provider outage blocks all single sign-on logins
description: Single sign-on users cannot log in due to provider outage.

title: Database migration corrupts account ownership records
description: A migration writes incorrect ownership mappings for multiple accounts.

title: Rate limiter configuration rejects nearly all production traffic
description: A bad configuration causes most valid production requests to be blocked.

title: Uploaded files become inaccessible across all projects
description: A storage outage prevents file access for all projects.

title: Webhook signing secret rotated incorrectly causing global verification failures
description: Webhook verification fails system-wide after a bad secret rotation.

title: Session store outage logs out active users platform-wide
description: Active sessions are dropped and new sessions cannot be created.

title: Preview and production domains resolve to invalid target globally
description: A routing change points both preview and production domains to an invalid target.

title: Background job scheduler stops dispatching all critical tasks
description: No scheduled critical jobs are dispatched after the latest deploy.

title: Saved filter names not sorted alphabetically
description: Saved filters appear in inconsistent order.

title: Header icon tooltip uses outdated wording
description: Tooltip copy does not match current product terminology.

title: API changelog entry links to wrong section
description: The changelog link points to an unrelated documentation section.

title: Keyboard shortcut hint missing from command palette
description: Shortcut hint is absent from one command palette entry.

title: Divider line appears too dark in dark mode
description: Divider styling has too much contrast in dark theme.

title: Hover card delay longer than configured setting
description: Hover cards take longer to appear than configured.

title: Breadcrumb current page item is not bolded consistently
description: Current breadcrumb styling differs across layouts.

title: Form section heading margin too large on mobile
description: Headings take up excess vertical space on mobile devices.

title: Textarea resize handle overlaps helper text
description: The resize handle partially covers helper copy.

title: Notifications list preserves scroll after mark all as read incorrectly
description: Scroll jumps to the wrong place after marking all as read.

title: Workspace switcher opens duplicate requests on rapid selection
description: Rapid switching sends duplicate workspace load requests.

title: Invoice status badge lags after successful payment
description: Badge does not update immediately after payment success.

title: Search suggestions include archived projects unexpectedly
description: Archived projects still appear in active search suggestions.

title: Two-factor authentication setup QR code expires too quickly
description: QR code becomes invalid before users finish setup.

title: Subscription cancellation email not sent for immediate cancellations
description: Immediate cancellations do not trigger the expected email notification.

title: Webhook event order reversed during retry burst
description: Retried events can arrive out of order during heavy retry bursts.

title: Storage cleanup job deletes active temporary files
description: A cleanup job removes files that are still in use.

title: User role sync from identity provider delays admin access
description: Newly granted admin roles do not sync quickly enough.

title: Bulk export endpoint returns partial files without error
description: Some exports complete with truncated data and no explicit failure.

title: Region failover script points traffic to standby with stale data
description: Failover sends traffic to a standby instance with stale records.

title: Certificate rotation breaks API connectivity for all clients
description: After certificate rotation, all clients fail to connect to the API.

title: Global config rollback leaves service in mixed incompatible state
description: Rollback produces a mixed configuration that breaks core service behavior.

title: Primary authentication database unreachable in all regions
description: The authentication datastore is unavailable across all regions, blocking logins.

title: Account settings save button remains in loading state after success
description: The save button continues showing a loading spinner even after settings are successfully saved.

title: Help article search returns no results for exact title match
description: Searching for a help article by its exact title sometimes returns no results even though the article exists.
